games._comment: === NHL PO R1 2026 Screening (2026-04-16, MoneyPuck 5v5 All Season xGF%) ===

games.prediction_basis: 5v5 xGF% BUF 49.95% vs BOS 47.29%, diff 2.66pp. L1 SKIP (< 5pt). BUF home ice PO (+7%) only. NOTE: BOS PDO 102.26, Goals%(all) 54.98% >> 5v5 xGF% 47.29% (+7.69pp) = luck-driven, PO regression risk.
games.skip_note_odds: Odds for predicted winner (Buffalo Sabres): 1.61. EV = -11.45%. Below thresholds.
sources: NHL.com 2026 playoffs first round schedule results
games.outcome_note: BUF 4-3 BOS G1. 予測HIT (SKIP no-bet). L1 diff 2.66pp で skip 判断だが home +7% が効いた。BOS PDO 102 / Goals%>xGF% over-index (luck-driven) の PO regression 想定通り。

games.prediction_basis: 5v5 xGF% TBL 54.00% vs MTL 47.89%, diff 6.11pp. L1 PASS. TBL home PO +7%. MTL Goals%(all) 53.33% >> xGF% 47.89% = +5.44pp overperformance (PDO 101.81, regression risk). Holmberg injured (depth, minor).
games.n006_note: G1 goalie confirm needed (dailyfaceoff 4/18 morning). TBL=Vasilevskiy expected. MTL=Dobes expected (RS vs TBL: 2-1, .928sv%, 2.15GAA).

series_context.mtl_suzuki: Suzuki 101pts career high. Slafkovsky 7pts(4G3A) vs TBL.
series_context.status: CAUTION -> GO upgrade pending: goalie confirm + odds confirm (need odds >= 1.38)

games.miss_analysis: 予測MISS (Slafkovsky hat trick + OT GWG 1:22 PP). CAUTION no-bet のため P&L 影響なし。L1 xGF% 6.11pp差・TBL home PO +7%補正が MTL young core explosion (Slafkovsky 3G / Suzuki assists) に覆された。Type A A021アップセット候補。
games.caution_reason: Confidence 76% >= 75, EV +16.28% > +5%, min odds 1.53 > 1.38 (PASSED). CAUTION maintained until goalie confirmed (Vasilevskiy/Dobes expected dailyfaceoff 4/18 morning). If confirmed: upgrade to GO.
games.date_note: date=2026-04-18 は古いラベル。実際のG1は4/19開催。line 879-909のエントリが最終結果を保持。

games.prediction_basis: 5v5 xGF% CAR 56.31% vs OTT 55.65%, diff 0.66pp. L1 SKIP. Both elite (55%+ xGF%). CAR home ice (+7%) only. Near-even series by process.
games.series_note: Both xGF%55%+ elite. If OTT wins series = NOT an xGF%-based upset.
games.skip_note_odds: Odds for predicted winner (Carolina Hurricanes): 1.65. EV = -12.55%. Below thresholds.
games.outcome_note: CAR 2-0 OTT G1 shutout. 予測HIT (SKIP no-bet). 両チーム elite xGF% だが home +7% と完封試合で CAR が優位を確実化。

games.prediction_basis: 5v5 xGF% PIT 51.03% vs PHI 50.63%, diff 0.40pp. L1 SKIP. Coin flip. PIT home ice (+7%) only.
games.skip_note_odds: Odds for predicted winner (Pittsburgh Penguins): 1.67. EV = -13.16%. Below thresholds.
games.miss_analysis: PHI 3-2 PIT UPSET (Drysdale/Sanheim/Martone 各1G, Rust 2G PIT)。Konecny 1A, Crosby 0pt held off stat sheet。 L1 xGF% 0.40pp coin flip で SKIP 判断自体は妥当。home PIT +7% が外れた要因: (1) Crosby/Malkin veteran core が PHI young energy (Drysdale/Martone) に追いつかず、(2) RS 最終20G で PIT xGF% 低下傾向・PHI rivalry モチベーション、(3) Vladar (PHI G) の save work。P019 候補 evidence として適合。
games.outcome_note: PHI young energy outpaced PIT veteran core. Sloppy Pens bottled up.

games.prediction_basis: 5v5 xGF% COL 56.67% vs LAK 51.97%, raw diff 4.70pp (below 5pt threshold). Score-adjusted 5v5: COL 57.48% vs LAK 51.75% = diff 5.73pp (passes threshold). COL Presidents Trophy, Makar healthy, home +7%.

l1_data.note: COL leads big -> score-adj reveals true gap

games.caution_reason: Score-adj 5.73pp PASSED L1. Home +7%. But conf 66% < 75 AND EV -5.62% < +5%. No GO upgrade even with goalie confirm. Effectively SKIP for bet purposes.

games.prediction_basis: 5v5 xGF% MIN 51.50% > DAL 50.79% (MIN higher by 0.71pp). L1 SKIP. DAL home +7% offsets MIN edge. NOTE: lower seed MIN has better 5v5 process.
games.type_a_watch: MIN(C3) higher 5v5 xGF% than DAL(C2). MIN win would NOT be xGF%-based upset.
games.skip_note_odds: Odds for predicted winner (Dallas Stars): 1.82. EV = -7.18%. Below thresholds.
games.miss_analysis: MIN 6-1 DAL BLOWOUT UPSET (seed upset: C3 > C2 home). L1 xGF% では MIN 51.50% が DAL 50.79% より 0.71pp 高く、lower seed だが process で上回っていた (type_a_watch に記録済み)。home DAL +7% を MIN の圧倒的攻勢が覆した: Kaprizov 1G2A, Boldy 1G1A, Eriksson Ek 2G (PP), Zuccarello 3A, Hartman 1G + PA to Kaprizov。前半6分半で 4-0 lead, Oettinger 23 saves. Wallstedt (MIN) 27 saves Playoff debut。→ "seed順位よりxGF%順位を優先すべし" 教訓。L1ラベル「SKIP」自体は妥当だが predicted_winner を DAL にしたのが誤り（L1 higher xGF% team = MIN を予測すべき）。
games.outcome_note: MIN 6-1 blowout. Kaprizov+Boldy 40G teammates explosion. Wallstedt PO debut 27sv. type_a_watch が事前に示唆していた seed vs xGF% の矛盾が顕在化。

games.prediction_basis: 5v5 xGF% VGK 54.37% vs UTA 52.41%, diff 1.96pp. L1 SKIP. VGK home +7%.
games.skip_note_odds: Odds for predicted winner (Vegas Golden Knights): 1.64. EV = -8.16%. Below thresholds.
games.outcome_note: VGK 4-2 UTA G1. 予測HIT (SKIP no-bet, conf 56%)。home +7% が効いた。UTA P1 seed 挑戦成らず。

games.prediction_basis: 5v5 xGF% ANA 51.76% > EDM 51.54% (ANA higher by 0.22pp). L1 SKIP. EDM home +7% only. NOTE: lower seed ANA marginally better 5v5 process. McDavid/Draisaitl individual impact not fully in team xGF%.
games.type_a_watch: ANA(P3) marginally higher 5v5 xGF% than EDM(P2). ANA win would NOT be xGF%-based upset.
games.skip_note_odds: Odds for predicted winner (Edmonton Oilers): 1.6. EV = -18.40%. Below thresholds.
sources: FOX Sports nhl playoffs round 1 game 1 boxscore
games.outcome_note: EDM 4-3 ANA G1 (Kapanen 2G incl. late winner 1:54 remaining 3rd, Dickinson 2G)。予測HIT (SKIP no-bet, conf 51%)。type_a_watch が ANA xGF% marginally higher を警戒していたが home +7% + McDavid/Draisaitl impact で EDM 逃げ切り。late rally で決着: 3rd period まで僅差 → Kapanen 2nd goal が decisive。
